summary: Futuristic AI-powered technology company website for Yadav Tech with Tesla-style minimalism, Apple-style premium layout, dark neon blue cyber theme, glassmorphism, 3D floating elements, and smooth animations
architectural_notes: Single-page application with dark mode default
Design system: Deep Space Black, Neon Blue, Electric Purple Glow color scheme
UI components: Floating cards, blurred glass panels, gradient borders, glassmorphism
Animations: AI grid background, particle effects, scroll-triggered animations, smooth motion
WhatsApp integration for floating chat button
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Professional portrait photo of Nitesh Kumar Yadav wearing a Calvin Klein hoodie, centered composition with clean background (founder-nitesh.dim_400x400.png)

existing_features.title: Create hero section with heading 'AI-Powered Websites & Apps Built for the Future', subtext 'From intelligent automation to scalable digital platforms, Yadav Tech builds next-generation solutions.', three CTA buttons ('Start Your AI Project', 'Schedule Consultation', 'Chat on WhatsApp'), and an animated glowing AI sphere or digital brain visual

Create About Founder section titled 'Meet The Visionary' featuring Nitesh Kumar Yadav as Founder & CEO, description 'A young technology entrepreneur focused on building AI-driven digital platforms that empower businesses.', founder image placeholder, signature style layout, and quote: 'I don't just build software. I build intelligent digital assets that create long-term business value.' – Nitesh Kumar Yadav

Create Services section with 6 animated 3D futuristic cards that glow on hover: 1) AI Website Development (Smart chatbots, recommendation engines, automation systems), 2) Android App Development (High-performance scalable mobile apps), 3) iOS App Development (Premium Apple-grade applications), 4) AI SaaS Platforms (Subscription-based intelligent platforms), 5) Business Automation Systems (AI dashboards + analytics), 6) E-Commerce with AI (Smart product suggestions + automation)

Create AI Technology Stack section displaying futuristic tech grid with 6 technologies: Machine Learning, OpenAI API Integration, ChatGPT Integration, AI Recommendation Engine, Real-Time Analytics Dashboard, Cloud Deployment Architecture. Add animated connection lines between technologies
Create Product Showcase section with 5 animated device mockups: AI Trading Dashboard UI, AI Chatbot System, SaaS Admin Panel, Mobile App Preview, AI Automation Flow
Create Pricing section with 4 tiers: Starter Website (₹9,999), Business Pro (₹24,999), AI Powered Website (₹39,999), Mobile App + AI (₹79,999+). Add glowing 'Most Popular' badge to appropriate tier

Create Why Yadav Tech section with 6 benefit points: AI-First Architecture, Scalable Cloud Systems, Startup-Level Innovation, Enterprise-Grade Security, 1 Year Free Technical Support, Deployment + Maintenance
Create Global Vision section with headline 'Building India's Next AI Tech Brand' and content: 'Yadav Tech aims to become a global AI solutions provider delivering intelligent platforms worldwide.'

Create Contact section with smart contact form (fields for name, email, phone, message), WhatsApp floating button, email contact, phone contact, and location 'India'. Add futuristic glowing submit button

Create AI Project Calculator feature that estimates cost automatically based on selected features. Allow clients to select project features (website type, mobile app, AI integration, e-commerce, automation) and display calculated estimate

Implement comprehensive design system with deep space black background, neon blue and electric purple glow accents, floating cards, blurred glass panels (glassmorphism), gradient borders, AI grid background animation, subtle particle effects, scroll-triggered animations, and modern futuristic typography throughout the entire website

Display brand message prominently with tagline 'Engineering the Future with Artificial Intelligence' and subheadline 'We build intelligent websites, mobile applications, and AI-powered digital ecosystems that transform businesses into scalable tech brands.'
Ensure website is fully responsive across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices with optimized layouts for each breakpoint

new_feature_requests.summary: Hero section with animated glowing AI sphere, heading, subtext, and CTA buttons
About Founder section with image placeholder, signature layout, and quote
Services section with 6 animated 3D futuristic cards (hover glow effects)
AI Technology Stack section with futuristic tech grid and animated connection lines
Product Showcase section with 5 animated device mockups
Pricing section with 4 tiers and glowing 'Most Popular' badge
Why Yadav Tech section with 6 benefit points
Global Vision section with headline and content about AI brand goals
Contact section with smart form, WhatsApp floating button, and contact details
AI Project Calculator feature for automatic cost estimation based on selected features

Replace the founder profile image in the About Founder section (located at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/main[1]/section[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/img[1]) with the uploaded founder photo
Ensure the new founder photo is stored as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated and referenced correctly in the AboutFounder component
